tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Naruto Uzumaki is a ninja from the Hidden Leaf Village known for his never-give-up attitude and strong determination.

He was once an outcast because he carried the powerful Nine-Tailed Fox inside him.

Despite his lonely childhood, Naruto dreams of becoming the Hokage to earn everyone’s respect.

Through hard work and perseverance, he becomes one of the strongest shinobi in history.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content:
• Shadow Clone Jutsu
  • Rasengan
  • Rasenshuriken
  • Sage Mode
  • Kurama Chakra Mode
  • Six Paths Sage Mode
  • Massive Chakra Reserves
  • Enhanced Healing Ability
  • Superhuman Speed & Reflexes
  • Advanced Taijutsu
  • Wind Release Chakra
  • Truth-Seeking Orbs
  • Chakra Arms
  • Tailed Beast Bomb
  • Sensory Abilities

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Favorite food is ramen
  • Host of the Nine-Tailed Fox (Kurama)
  • Became the 7th Hokage
  • Was once the weakest student in the academy
  • Never gives up on his friends

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Sasuke Uchiha is a powerful ninja from the Uchiha clan known for his intelligence and calm personality.

He was driven by revenge after witnessing the destruction of his clan by his brother Itachi.

Sasuke seeks power at any cost to achieve his goals and surpass his limits.

Over time, he evolves from a revenge-driven individual into a protector of the ninja world.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content:
• Sharingan
  • Rinnegan
  • Chidori
  • Amaterasu
  • Susanoo
  • Fire Style Jutsu
  • Lightning Release
  • Genjutsu Mastery
  • High Speed Combat
  • Swordsmanship
  • Space-Time Ninjutsu
  • Chidori Variants
  • Advanced Tactical Intelligence
  • Curse Mark Power
  • Perfect Susanoo

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Last surviving member of the Uchiha clan
  • Younger brother of Itachi Uchiha
  • Trained under Orochimaru
  • Rival and best friend of Naruto
  • Married Sakura and has a daughter Sarada

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Sakura Haruno is a kunoichi from the Hidden Leaf Village known for her intelligence and medical skills.

She starts as a normal ninja but becomes one of the strongest kunoichi through hard work.

Under Tsunade’s training, she gains incredible strength and healing abilities.

Sakura plays a crucial role in supporting her team during battles.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content:
• Medical Ninjutsu
  • Superhuman Strength
  • Chakra Control
  • Healing Techniques
  • Summoning Jutsu (Katsuyu)
  • Advanced Taijutsu
  • Byakugou Seal
  • Poison Resistance
  • Battle Intelligence
  • Support Skills
  • Regeneration Ability
  • Precise Chakra Attacks
  • High Endurance
  • Team Coordination
  • Defensive Techniques

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Student of Tsunade
  • One of the strongest medical ninjas
  • Teammate of Naruto and Sasuke
  • Married Sasuke
  • Mother of Sarada

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Kakashi Hatake is a highly skilled ninja known as the Copy Ninja for his ability to replicate techniques using his Sharingan.

He is the leader of Team 7 and mentor to Naruto, Sasuke, and Sakura.

Kakashi is calm, intelligent, and always values teamwork above all.

He later becomes the Sixth Hokage of the Hidden Leaf Village.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content:
• Sharingan
  • Lightning Blade (Chidori)
  • Copy Ninja Techniques
  • Kamui (Space-Time Jutsu)
  • High Intelligence
  • Advanced Taijutsu
  • Stealth & Assassination
  • Fire, Water & Lightning Release
  • Genjutsu Skills
  • Summoning Jutsu (Dogs)
  • Fast Reflexes
  • Strategic Combat
  • Hand Seal Mastery
  • Shadow Clone Jutsu
  • Leadership Skills

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Known as the Copy Ninja
  • Student of Minato Namikaze
  • Always wears a mask
  • Reads Icha Icha novels
  • Became the Sixth Hokage

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Itachi Uchiha is a prodigy of the Uchiha clan known for his intelligence and powerful genjutsu.

He sacrificed everything, including his clan, to protect the Hidden Leaf Village.

Though seen as a villain, his actions were driven by peace and love for his brother Sasuke.

Itachi remains one of the most respected and tragic characters in the series.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content:
• Sharingan
  • Mangekyou Sharingan
  • Tsukuyomi
  • Amaterasu
  • Susanoo
  • Genjutsu Mastery
  • Fire Style Jutsu
  • High Intelligence
  • Shuriken Mastery
  • Fast Hand Seals
  • Crow Clone Jutsu
  • Illusion Techniques
  • Strategic Thinking
  • Stealth Skills
  • Exceptional Reflexes

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Killed his clan to prevent war
  • Joined Akatsuki as a spy
  • Brother of Sasuke
  • Highly intelligent prodigy
  • Secretly protected the Leaf Village
